Fast turnaround • Pickup & delivery available

Reliable Small Engine Repair You Can Count On.

Based in Holland Patent, NY. We fix, tune, and service the equipment that keeps your yard, driveway, and property moving — fast, affordable, and dependable.

Sales & service for the gear you rely on. Honest work and quick diagnostics from a local shop that understands busy schedules.

Call or Text (315) 813-8109 Request Service

Quick Turnaround

We work to get your equipment back in service fast.

Pickup & Delivery

Convenient and hassle-free — available to save you a trip.

Friendly Local Service

Message, call, or text anytime.

Ready for the season

We tune it, test it, and get it working right.

From spring startup service to pre-winter snowblower and snowmobile prep, we keep your gear dependable when you need it most.

Contact

Off-season services available

Straight answers, fair pricing, and work built for people who rely on their equipment every day.

Services

Repairs and tune-ups for the equipment you count on.

We fix, tune, and service equipment so it's ready for the season. Get mowers, trimmers, chainsaws, rototillers, pressure washers, and blowers tuned and ready for spring and summer. Bring snowblowers and snowmobiles in during the off-season so you're not scrambling when the first storm hits.

🌿

Lawn Mowers

Blade, belt, carburetor, and startup issues handled with season-ready tune-ups.

🪚

Chainsaws

From tune-ups to troubleshooting, we help your saw cut clean and start reliably.

🧵

Weed Eaters / String Trimmers

We fix hard starts, fuel problems, and weak running so trimming gets done right.

🚜

Rototillers

Get your tiller serviced and running strong before garden season starts.

💦

Pressure Washers

We get pressure washers ready for home jobs, cleanup work, and heavy use.

🍂

Leaf Blowers

Tune-ups and repairs for blowers that need strong, dependable performance.

❄️

Snowblowers

Get snowblowers serviced before the next snow season so they're ready to go.

🛷

Snowmobiles

Off-season service and repairs to keep your sled trail-ready for winter.

🏁

Go-Karts

Repair help for family fun and weekend machines that need a little extra attention.

🏍️

Dirt Bikes

We help diagnose and service dirt bikes that need to be running right again.

🛠️

Other Yard Toys

If it has a small engine and needs attention, reach out and ask. We like a challenge.

Fast turnaround times

Affordable rates

Pickup & delivery available

Message, call, or text

How it works

A simple process that gets your gear back to work.

1

Message, call or text us

Tell us what you have, what it's doing, and how we can reach you.

2

We pick up or you drop off

Pickup & delivery is available, or bring it by if that's easier.

3

We fix & tune it

We diagnose the problem, make the repair, and tune it to run better.

4

Fast turnaround, back ready to run

We keep the process moving so you can get back to the job, property, or trail.

Contact

Request Service

Tell us what you have, what it's doing, and how you want to be reached. We'll do our best to get you taken care of quickly.

We'll review your request and get back as soon as we can.

Call or text anytime

(315) 813-8109

If it's easier, just call or text and tell us what you need. We're set up for quick, local communication.

Good to include in your message

  • Equipment type and make/model if available
  • What it's doing and when the problem started
  • Whether you need pickup/delivery or will drop off
  • Your city or neighborhood so we can plan service
